_note: Drive sources for the bible sync (/api/bible-sync). 'sheetId' is the client's bible spreadsheet; schema 'adtracker' = standard single 'Ad Tracker' tab; schema 'chief' = one tab per market. Once GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON is set on the worker AND the service account email is shared (Viewer) on each sheet, the sync exports each tab as CSV, parses via bible-parse.mjs, and writes DRAFTER_KV bible:{slug} (overriding the seed).

therapy-lights.note: title is 'Therapy Lights Client Bible + Account Review (Recycling)' — verify tab name on first sync
